gold_cypher:
MATCH (tour:Tournament)<-[:IN_TOURNAMENT]-(m:Match)
OPTIONAL MATCH (p:Person)-[sg:SCORED_GOAL]->(m)
WITH tour, m, COUNT(sg) AS goals
WITH tour, COUNT(m) AS totalMatches, SUM(goals) AS totalGoals
RETURN tour.name AS tournamentName, toFloat(SUM(totalGoals))/totalMatches AS avgGoalsPerMatch, totalMatches
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Tournament) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name, avg(n.MATCHES scored per match), n.total_matches

gold_cypher:
MATCH (t:Team)-[:PARTICIPATED_IN]->(tour:Tournament {name: 'China 2007'}) 
MATCH (p:Person)-[sg:SCORED_GOAL]->(m:Match)<-[:PLAYED_IN]-(t)
WITH t, COUNT(sg) AS totalGoals, COUNT(DISTINCT m) AS totalMatches
RETURN t.name AS teamName, toFloat(totalGoals) / totalMatches AS avgGoals
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Team)<-[r0:PARTICIPATED_IN]-(m0:Tournament {name: 'China 2007'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name, avg(n.person:Person SCORED_GOAL)

gold_cypher:
MATCH (s:Squad)<-[:IN_SQUAD]-(p:Person)-[:PLAYED_IN]->(m:Match)
WITH s, p, COUNT(m) AS matchesPlayed
